title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Work with SQL and dashboards to analyze business metrics. Build reports, collaborate with stakeholders, and communicate insights.

title: Machine Learning Engineer (Entry)
description: Build and deploy ML models, work with Python, scikit-learn, and cloud services. Maintain pipelines and monitor models.

title: Frontend Developer (React)
description: Develop UI features using React and TypeScript. Work with REST APIs, state management, and modern CSS.

title: Backend Developer (Python)
description: Build backend services in Python. Design APIs, work with databases, and write tests. Familiar with Docker is a plus.

title: DevOps Engineer (Junior)
description: Support CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and basic cloud operations. Monitor services and automate tasks.

title: Data Engineer (Junior)
description: Build and maintain ETL pipelines, data warehouses, and batch or streaming jobs. Ensure data quality, lineage, and observability across sources.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst (Entry)
description: Monitor security alerts, triage incidents, support vulnerability assessments, and document controls. Work with SIEM and basic network concepts.

title: Product Manager (Associate)
description: Gather requirements, prioritize roadmap items, align engineering and stakeholders, and measure outcomes with metrics and experiments.

title: UX / UI Designer
description: Conduct user research, create wireframes and high-fidelity mockups, collaborate with developers, and validate designs with usability tests.

title: Mobile Developer (React Native)
description: Ship cross-platform mobile features, integrate APIs, handle offline states, and improve performance and crash reporting.

title: QA / Test Automation Engineer
description: Design test plans, automate UI and API tests, integrate tests in CI, and track defects with clear reproduction steps.

title: Site Reliability Engineer (Junior)
description: Improve reliability through SLIs/SLOs, on-call playbooks, incident postmortems, and capacity planning. Work with observability stacks.

title: Technical Writer
description: Produce developer documentation, API references, tutorials, and release notes. Work closely with engineers to clarify complex topics.

title: Sales Engineer (Technical)
description: Deliver product demos, answer technical questions in sales cycles, build proof-of-concept integrations, and support customer onboarding.

title: NLP / LLM Application Engineer
description: Prototype and productionize LLM features: prompting, evaluation, guardrails, RAG pipelines, and integration with existing products.

title: Game Developer (Gameplay / Unity)
description: Implement gameplay systems, collaborate with designers, profile performance, and ship builds for PC or mobile targets.

title: Embedded Software Engineer (Junior)
description: Develop firmware for microcontrollers, interface with sensors and buses, and debug hardware-software issues with oscilloscope or logic analyzer basics.

title: Financial Data Analyst
description: Support budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis. Build financial models, reconcile data, and present findings to finance leadership.

title: Customer Success Engineer
description: Guide customers through onboarding, troubleshoot integrations, advocate for product improvements, and reduce churn through proactive outreach.

title: Blockchain / Smart Contract Developer (Junior)
description: Develop and audit smart contracts, understand consensus and wallet flows, and build dApp frontends interacting with on-chain data.
